questions.question: What is 347 rounded to the nearest hundred?
questions.explanation: Look at the tens digit: 4. Since 4 < 5, round DOWN. $347 \rightarrow 300$

questions.question: When rounding 0.56 to the nearest tenth, you should round UP to 0.6.
questions.explanation: The hundredths digit is 6, which is ≥ 5, so you round UP to 0.6.

questions.question: What is 2,451 rounded to the nearest ten?
questions.explanation: Look at the ones digit: 1. Since 1 < 5, round DOWN... wait, actually look at the target: rounding to nearest ten means looking at the ones place. 1 < 5, so round down to 2,450.
